headline: Verizon Tests V2X Platform To Turn 5G Edge Into Mobility Revenue
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) highlighted its Edge Transportation Exchange in a new V2X proof of concept with Aptiv and Wind River. The collaboration showed vehicles securely sharing real time sensor and environmental data over Verizon's 5G and mobile edge computing network. The solution connected vehicles from different manufacturers without dedicated V2X hardware, focusing on safety, automation, and navigation use cases. For you as an investor, this sits at the intersection of...

headline: Samsung Galaxy S26 ignites a new wave of promotion wars
summary: In February, telcos, OEMs, and retailers launched 724 promotions, with Samsung’s Galaxy S26 launch sparking fresh offers for switchers, new customers, and upgraders.

raw.headline: Samsung Galaxy S26 ignites a new wave of promotion wars

headline: Verizon and ITT Are on Analysts’ Radar as Upgrades Suggest More Gains Ahead
summary: Wall Street is turning more constructive on infrastructure-linked names, and two fresh analyst calls this week make the case concrete. Scotiabank upgraded Verizon to Outperform with a raised price target, while Barclays initiated ITT with a cautiously positive view, both moves reflecting confidence in sustained infrastructure and network spending. Verizon: Scotiabank Sees Cheap Shares With ... Verizon and ITT Are on Analysts’ Radar as Upgrades Suggest More Gains Ahead

headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Brown-Forman, Cava Group, Dow, GE Vernova, Global Payments, Netflix, Shake Shack,  Starbucks, Verizon, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower once again on Monday, following a horrible week on Wall Street. With all of Wall Street looking for a solid non-farm payrolls report of 65,000 jobs added, it came in at a very disappointing 92,000 jobs lost, and the unemployment rate bumped up to 4.4%. headline: Scotiabank Upgrades Verizon Communications to Sector Outperform, Raises Price Target to $54.5
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Maher Yaghi   upgrades Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) from Sector Perform to Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $50.25 to $54.5.
